user.title: XBloom Coffee Machine
user.description: Enter the Bluetooth MAC address of your XBloom device. Run `xbloom scan` from a terminal to discover it, or check the XBloom Studio app.

account.title: XBloom Cloud Account (optional)
account.description: Optional — enter your XBloom app email/password to enable cloud recipe sync (search, import, export). Leave both blank to skip; the integration works fully over Bluetooth without an account, and cloud-only features will report a clear error instead of running.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the XBloom device. Check the MAC address and ensure Bluetooth is enabled.
error.account_incomplete: Enter both email and password, or leave both blank to skip cloud setup.

abort.no_devices_found: No XBloom devices found nearby. Make sure the machine is powered on.

account.title: XBloom Cloud Account
account.description: Add, update, or remove the optional XBloom cloud account used for cloud recipe sync (search, import, export). Leave both fields blank to remove a saved account, or leave the email unchanged with the password blank to make no changes. Setting a new or different email requires a password.

add_recipe.title: Add a recipe
add_recipe.description: Paste the recipe in YAML format. See docs/en/brewing-notes.md and skills/xbloom-brew/references/yaml-schema.md for the field reference.

edit_recipe_yaml.title: Edit a recipe
edit_recipe_yaml.description: Edit the YAML below. Renaming the recipe (changing the `name:` field) is allowed.

error.invalid_recipe: Recipe does not match the schema — {error}
error.recipe_exists: A recipe named {error} already exists. Use 'Edit a recipe' instead or pick another name.
error.account_password_required: Enter the password to set or change the cloud account.
error.account_email_required: Enter the email to set the cloud account.

abort.no_recipes: No recipes available. Use 'Add a recipe' to create one.

execute_recipe.name: Execute recipe
execute_recipe.description: Run a saved XBloom recipe, optionally overriding the grind size and/or grinder RPM for this brew only (coffee grinding recipes only).

recipe_name.name: Recipe name
recipe_name.description: Name of the saved recipe to run. Defaults to the currently selected recipe if omitted.

grind_size.name: Grind size
grind_size.description: Override the grind size (0 = finest, 80 = coarsest) for this brew only.

rpm.name: Grinder RPM
rpm.description: Override the grinder RPM for this brew only.

bypass_volume.name: Bypass volume
bypass_volume.description: Bypass water volume in ml added after the pours (0 = bypass off). Can be added even if the recipe has no bypass. Coffee recipes only.

bypass_temperature.name: Bypass temperature
bypass_temperature.description: Bypass water temperature in °C (0 = bypass off). Pair with a non-zero bypass volume. Coffee recipes only.

cloud_import_recipe.name: Import recipe from XBloom cloud
cloud_import_recipe.description: Fetch a recipe from an XBloom cloud share URL or id and save it as a local recipe. No XBloom account login is required.

share_url.name: Share URL
share_url.description: A share-h5.xbloom.com link, e.g. from the official app's Share button. Provide this or recipe_id, not both.

recipe_id.name: Recipe ID
recipe_id.description: The bare share id (the base64 value after ?id= in a share URL). Provide this or share_url, not both.

cloud_search_recipes.name: Search XBloom cloud recipes
cloud_search_recipes.description: List every recipe saved on the configured XBloom cloud account, optionally filtered by name.

query.name: Query
query.description: Filter results to recipes whose name contains this text (case-insensitive). Omit to list every recipe.

cloud_create_recipe.name: Create XBloom cloud recipe
cloud_create_recipe.description: Create a new recipe on the configured XBloom cloud account, either from an inline YAML recipe definition or by pushing an existing local recipe by name. Provide recipe_yaml or recipe_name, not both. Returns the new recipe's table ID and share URL.

recipe_yaml.name: Recipe (YAML)
recipe_yaml.description: The recipe definition in the same YAML format used by the local "Add a recipe" options-flow step. Provide this or recipe_name, not both.

recipe_name.name: Recipe name (push an existing local recipe)
recipe_name.description: Name of an existing local recipe to push to the cloud instead of defining one inline. Provide this or recipe_yaml, not both.

cloud_edit_recipe.name: Edit XBloom cloud recipe
cloud_edit_recipe.description: Change one or more fields of an existing recipe on the configured XBloom cloud account. Only the fields present in the YAML are changed — every omitted field keeps its current value.

table_id.name: Recipe table ID
table_id.description: The cloud recipe's table ID, from cloud_search_recipes or cloud_create_recipe's response.

recipe_yaml.name: Fields to change (YAML)
recipe_yaml.description: A YAML mapping of only the fields to change (e.g. just `name: New Name` to rename). Omitted fields are left unchanged.

cloud_delete_recipe.name: Delete XBloom cloud recipe
cloud_delete_recipe.description: Permanently delete a recipe from the configured XBloom cloud account. This cannot be undone.

table_id.name: Recipe table ID
table_id.description: The cloud recipe's table ID, from cloud_search_recipes or cloud_create_recipe's response.
